=Index of modules=

|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\A|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Action_link_key"| module Types.Action_link_key >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Types >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Almost"| module Lib.Email_or_phone.Almost >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Lib.Email_or_phone >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\C|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Comet"| module Comet >> ||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Connect_phone"| module Connect_phone >> ||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Current_user"| module Current_user >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module provides functions and types to manage the current user~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\D|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="D"| module Icons.D >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Icons >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Date"| module Date >> ||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Default_config"| module Page.Default_config >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Page >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A default configuration for pages~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\E|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Email"| module Email >> ||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Email_or_phone"| module Lib.Email_or_phone >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Lib >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Parse strings that can be e~-mails or phones~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\F|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="F"| module Icons.F >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Icons >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Fcm_notif"| module Fcm_notif >> ||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\G|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Group"| module Types.Group >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Types >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\H|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Handlers"| module Handlers >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module contains pre~-defined handlers for connect~, disconnect~, sign up~,
    add a new email~, etc~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\I|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Icons"| module Icons >> ||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\L|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Lib"| module Lib >> ||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\M|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Make"| module Page.Make >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Page >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Msg"| module Msg >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module provides functions to display messages ~(client~-side or
    server~-side~)~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\N|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Notif"| module Notif >> ||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\O|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Opt"| module Session.Opt >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Session >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Opt"| module Page.Make.Opt >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Page.Make >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Opt"| module Current_user.Opt >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Current_user >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Instead of exception~, the module <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Opt>> returns an option~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\P|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Page"| module Page >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Functor defining wrappers for services handlers returning pages~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Platform"| module Platform >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Platform type~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\R|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Register"| module Icons.Register >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Icons >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Request_cache"| module Request_cache >> ||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\S|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Services"| module Services >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module provides pre~-defined services for connect~, disconnect~, sign up~,
    add a new email~, etc~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Session"| module Session >> ||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\T|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Tips"| module Tips >> ||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Types"| module Types >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Types related to users~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\U|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="Uploader"| module Uploader >> ||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="User"| module User >> ||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="User"| module Types.User >> ~[<<a_api subproject="client" | module Types >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="User_proxy"| module User_proxy >> ||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="client" text="User_view"| module User_view >> ||
\\
